calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-06-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Matthew G. Whitten And Jeremy Hughes In Support
Off Calendar Mar-28-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Matthew G. Whitten; Gordon Rees Scully Mansukhani, LLP; 949-255-6950; appearing as counsel for defendant Titanium Metals Corporation.
Karen Evans; 415-975-3700; appearing as counsel for defendant Iluka Resources, Inc.
Laurence J. Graham; Plaintiff, appearing in Pro Per.

Mr. Graham contests the court's tentative ruling. Counsel for defendants object and state that Mr. Graham did not give timely notice that he would be contesting the tentative ruling. The court explains to the parties that it currently does not have jurisdiction over this matter due to the Notice of Removal that was filed. The court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT TITANIUM METALS CORPORATION'S MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS is OFF CALENDAR. Notice of Removal on file.

Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Quash Service Of Summons; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declarations Of Matthew G. Whitten And Jeremy Hughes In Support
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Continued To Mar-28-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 501
MINI MINUTES:

Hearing Re: DEFENDANT TITANIUM METALS CORPORATION's Motion To Quash Service Of Summons.

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Transferred to be heard in department 501 at 9:30 a.m. on March 28, 2024. That department handles all cases related to ownership of real property/leases per SF Local Rule 8.10A1.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
